reviews.review_title: Bought the game and have to pay again!
reviews.review_description: My friends and I bought the game long time ago and now we can't play in a private room together anymore as we now have to pay again to have access to something we had access to before, I do understand extra options or DLC's having a pay option, don't take features away that were in the base program. It does not sit well.

So, I’m confused about Meta horizon/worlds. Not enough people using VR, so they pivot to mobile, abandoning those who invested in VR, ensuring it won’t expand. As I’m being encouraged to go mobile, I can’t go mobile in this app….it only launches the app in VR. I’m confused and frustrated.

I downloaded this app cause i was bored one day and to my surprise it is very fun. Yes, its a little childish but the trivial questions are very challenging. At times i spend hours playing.  i recommend this to anyone who like trivial.
This game is very good but the people in it are kinda rude and disrespectful but overall fun (ps pls fix the painting part it sucks)
I played for a longtime, it definitely makes you feel smart.
i love this game

I can't remember downloading this I'm not even sure if I paid for it 😂 growing up I used to love trivial persuit.. Unfortunately I was the only one so nobody would play...
This has a fun interesting spin on the game and how you answer..
There's an objective it's set for me to play solo mode however that means I have to purchase that mode.. Which I won't be doing.

There are enough players on to find a game which is really good.

I can't for the life of. Me figuring out what to do in the museum?? I found just 1 question there... It says something about scanning stuff but no scanner in sight.. I would like to see a better tutorial in that case.

It's a chilled experience if you can't find anyone interested in game night then this is the game for you 👍

Oh I've seen ppl join on phone but apparently you have to have thr headset on to use your phone? What's the point who is joining on their phone and leaving the headset on??
Just play in vr
Love this app. Just wish everyone was playing from VR instead of those playing from their phones... what's the point in paying all the money for the vr to be the only one in the room half the time.

Enjoyable, relaxing, good varied average questions, Fun when with other “respectful” players, and other real players instead of the AI bots. 
Meet some interesting people but sometimes some real jerks too. 
Occasionally younger immature kids, or inconsiderate people being stupid, but that is everywhere you go. 
Occasional glitches; The glitches are rare. 
Should have some tutorials on some of the tasks, How to use certain in game objects. Usually get help from others.  
For Creator(s): The ‘bot’ (fake player) avatars are annoying, The Willy bot is kind of cool, but the others are annoying. 
Need a little more avatar customization. I don’t like the half-body avatars, but maybe our technology can get caught up to speed on that. 
I hope to see MORE…, updates, improvements, more game varieties, Tournaments.
Need a way to report people being obnoxious, vulgar, inconsiderate, rude. Make good use of a “3-strike” warning rule.

Overall Fun and enjoyable so far.
Its pretty fun
A review

Do NOT buy this game. It's not even finished. I bought it at launch and was expecting it to grow. There are still (at time of writing) 3 unfinished hub worlds. The only two open are the museum (history) and the lab (science). They want an extra 5 bucks to unlock the safari world which should have been part of the game from the start.

Trivia is fun, yes....but avoid this at all costs and spend your money on a developer that gives a crap about releasing a finished product.
Doesn’t load
Love this game.
Super 👍🏻👍🏻👍🏻

reviews.review_title: Clearly AI driven but fun anyway
reviews.review_description:
Kinda fun when you have other actual players instead of just the AI bots and Willy. Occasionally meet some interesting people but sometimes some real jerks too.  An obviously young kid cussing a storm up and a pair of chicks who kept yelling out answers but that's not too often.

The questions and selection of answers are clearly AI driven.  The grammar and format varies and sometimes are totally mismatched or not 100% accurate.

Occasionally gets buggy by having 2 or 3 people in the same 'chair' and sometimes a person is shown that is not part of that particular game.
Love it. Met a lot of awesome folks. Just wish the other worlds were open
I could, and do, spend hours on this game!!  It’s a relaxing game and you meet a lot of interesting people on the way!!!!
Very cool game. Would be better if you had tutorial on different worlds.
This is a fun game. Lots of good questions though sometimes they repeat. I'd recommend it.

Good set of questions. Can be quite addicting. Game is still bare bones but what is there is very fun. The only thing I dont like is that its an endless mode, hopefully they add a matchmaking set up, as in, you join a game lobby, and there is only a set amount of questions and who ever has the most points after the last question wins.
If you like trivia, you'll like this

Trivia Crack World brings the classic quiz experience into VR in a fun and engaging way. The gameplay is simple, accessible, and perfect for quick sessions. A great choice for trivia fans looking for a fresh immersive twist.
This is a really fun and relaxing game

Really enjoyable game. Questions arent too hard or too easy - thry just rightand everyone is pretty chill. More to it than just answering questions. There is exploring to do as well. Great way to pass some time

I am entertained, the questions are good, mix of hard and easy questions, very enjoyable. Sofar nothing really negative sticks out, but i hope updates keep coming for new content or just little adittions like more stuff to wear or throw around at the table. All in all good casual game to play.
I had to uninstallend, reinstall and restart the headset, because it wouldn't let me past the loading scree.. but I finally got it working
Fun game to get lost in and just answer questions without having to wait for another opponent

reviews.review_title: This is a trivia must have !!
reviews.review_description: If you like trivia this is a must have game . Prove your knowledge against other players in different categories. The minigames are super fun. 100% recommended !!!
honestly it's the truth it's really good
to many purchases

the game is decent as far as trivia goes just like it was back in the day what it first came out crazy that they're trying to put in all these little mini games and make you pay for single player content though
i enjoy this game a lot it's my go to game when i need some social interaction without a lot of running around her stress i can sit down relax and talk to people while playing a fun game.

This game is getting better and better.I like the trivia and the little in-world interactions are fun too. Waiting impatiently for the rest of the "park"
to open.
Started playing Trivia Crack about 10 years ago on mobile. The VR version holds up well.
Gg
Can't stop playing. Most questions are medium difficulty and are presented in an easy to understand format.
There are minor bugs and glitches. The questions aren't too hard or too easy. Social aspect can be fun in public rooms if you get a social group
Good few too many in app purchases to unlock stuff
Helps keep your Brain active easy to make new friends lots to do. Fantastic. Loving it
Great game, wish there were more languages.
I wish they would add more worlds.
Very god but after your new it makes you have to buy to be in a private lobby
I love it ,of course we wait for updates ,more questions and more board games in it 😀 😉 😄 But I enjoying it so much!!!!
Top

Me my husband and son really enjoy this game! Lots of questions, lots of knowledge also learnt! Public rooms are also fun! Some cute costumes to buy with tickets you win in the public room! Bright, colourful and sociable
Oi

So much fun and you get to meet people from around the world ! Love it ! Need a boot button
For disrupters , thanks
It's okay

The trivia and world itself works well, but there aren’t enough human players to fill lobbies. You end up with tables full of bots which isn’t nearly as fun. I see the potential and hope the game becomes more popular.
Fun to play with friends and family
The is fun and i like it better than the phone app
I have a lot of hours in this game, its fun and social, worth every penny.
I got this game for free while it was limited time and it is AMAZING! My expectations were low because I don’t like trivia crack mobile too much but this blew them out of the roof! 10/10!

I paid £7.99 when this came out and suddenly I come back and find Solo and Multiplayer rooms are locked and now we can’t play unless we pay more!

I mean sure it was a cheap price at first and nothing wrong with paid content that’s being added overtime, but it feels like early users got screwed over out of basic modes that should be available to early adopters.

I enjoyed playing in closed rooms with my friends :/
I really enjoy this game, well done

I have always loved trivia crack. When the notification popped up that it was on VR i had to get it. I definitely do not regret it. The questions are fun, the lobby is nice, the movement is smooth, and the different activities makes it fun.

Questions are hardly tied to US. How the hell i should know that some sports player wasn't a member of which team in US hockey or what is the name of some tv-show musician host? This is very dumb to make international game and tie a lot of question to US scene. 
The concept of quiz is very interesting but multiplayer is very lame. There is no such thing as competition at all, you just sit and answer the questions without any cases where somebody could lose or win.
There is no way to spend tickets other than on some cheap shirts. I have thousands of tickets and it is pointless to farm them
I enjoy competing in this game and I love the colorful graphics.
A all around great trivia game for sure!
Great to play with friends
I like this game especially the mobile version but my only complaint is you have to pay for private worlds but the game is fun and challenging

I had the mobile version of this game do I love the VR edition. I play this game almost daily. Some questions are easy and some are hard but I love expanding my knowledge on the answers that I don’t know. Giving it 4 stars because the game does glitch and sometimes I get stuck in a part of the room where I can’t play the game and have to restart it.
A good game, I play it with the family.
Simple and fun. Great for killing time
Had a good start but now the multiplayer doesn’t really work anymore. I loaded it up a couple weeks ago and all the “coming soon” stuff was still on hold and there were just bots.
I can't wait to purchase the whole thing but so far I'm loving it! Gonna invite my dude to come join now and try it together!
Ive always had a lot of fun playing Trivia Crack on my phone with friends so it's pretty neat getting to play it in VR. Its a whole different experience and a lot more fun somehow!
Great place to learn and feel good about yourself. The players were very friendly!
I would recommend that
I really enjoy playing trivia crack with my daughter good way to keep brain sharp and learn new things!
If you hate this game for any reason other than money its because you're a moron and blame the game for you not knowing the answers.
Great super great very fun

It was fun for 5 minutes when I was trying to figure everything out. But, when I tried to connect with the players I realized literally everyone was a bot. It’s very obvious when they spawn in from nowhere, move around in random directions, and then spawn out after a minute or so.

If you are looking for something to pass the time, this is for you. But, if you are looking for competitive content and real people, please don’t get this game.
Quite enjoyable. A bit glitchy when in a public game.
Just a fun trivia game - defo better than most on the market
Terrible game

This game was not what I thought it was going to be. The multiplayer is you just sitting in a room with x amount of players answering questions. You have no rounds, competition or purpose but you do have a score that just lets you know who's been there the longest You have special rounds where you shoot birds, catch a fish and mix chemicals to get your answers. They loose their appeal after a couple times. The environment is ok I guess. The avatars are just hands, torsos and heads. They are like the ones in PokerVr and limited variation option. Over all this game is a one trick honey that could have been so much better. It should and even if it was I'd still feel ripped off. So don't wab b stw your time on the bu
I like the fact we can play with people on mobile and the vr headset is a cool concept.

reviews.review_title: Problem can’t find a fix for
reviews.review_description: The game refuses to load I’ve been waiting for early 20 minutes and just nothing
